identification: the logarithmic throat bounce gives a power-law mass m ∝ ε^p, governing the chargeless neutrino sector's form and ordering (#113) but not its value (×28 = 2^4.8 amplification); the charged-lepton (winding) and quark (cavity) hierarchies are different mechanisms — the flavor hierarchy is not unified by the log-bounce
mechanism: log-bounce S = c(rs/2)ln(1/ε) ⟹ m ∝ ε^p (power law)
neutrino: the log-bounce sector: m_ν ∝ ε^{4.8} (#112), right ordering, value overshoots ×28 (#113)
charged_leptons: winding ladder β·k² (#71), irregular ln(m) — NOT log-bounce
quarks: cavity overtones / n_part (#77–#80), irregular ln(m) — NOT log-bounce
why_residual: m ∝ ε^p hypersensitivity (∂ln m/∂ln ε = p) ⟹ flavor values residual (#108)
open: neutrino value overshoot (#113); charged/quark irregular magnitudes (flavor puzzle #108)

tests.name: T1_goal
tests.description: Audit whether the three-generation flavor hierarchy can be read off the logarithmic throat bounce lengths L*(ε) = (rs/2) ln(1/ε) (#88/#132), via tunnelling masses m ~ e^{−S}.

tests.name: T2_log_bounce_power_law_mass
tests.description: S = c·L*(ε) = c(rs/2)ln(1/ε) ⟹ m = m_0 e^{−S} = m_0 ε^{c rs/2} = m_0 ε^p: the logarithm turns the exponential into a POWER LAW in the throat penetration depth ε (verified e^{−cL*} = ε^p).

tests.name: T3_neutrino_sector_is_log_bounce
tests.description: ν = the only tunnelling sector (k=0 chargeless, #86/#88); m_ν ∝ ε^{4.8} (#112), a power law. ε_n ∝ 1/χ_n (#79/#113) ⟹ right ordering (normal), but p=4.8 amplifies the χ_n spread: ×2 in ε → 2^4.8 ≈ 28× in mass — the ×28 overshoot (#113). Form & ordering governed, value residual.

tests.name: T4_charged_leptons_winding_not_bounce
tests.description: Charged leptons are Dirac (c₁=±1, EM-propped, no tunnelling, #86/#88); masses from the winding ladder β·k² (#71), not the bounce. ln(m) irregular (gen-differences not equal ⟹ not a clean power law).

tests.name: T5_quarks_cavity_not_bounce
tests.description: Quarks are shell-resolving cavity overtones (#77–#80, the n_part sector), not throat-tunnelling; their ln(m) is irregular (the flavor puzzle, #97/#107).

tests.name: T6_log_bounce_hypersensitivity
tests.description: m ∝ ε^p ⟹ ∂ln m/∂ln ε = p: masses are hypersensitive to the throat penetration depth (×2 in ε → 2^p in mass). The flavor values' irreducibility (#108) is a consequence of the exponential mass-action relation — the log-bounce amplification — not a separate mystery.
tests.consequence: flavor values residual by log-bounce hypersensitivity (#108/#112)

tests.name: T7_scope
tests.description: An audit/classification: the log-bounce ⟹ power-law mechanism governs the NEUTRINO sector (form & ordering, #113), not its value; charged leptons are winding (#71), quarks cavity (#77). The flavor hierarchy is a three-mechanism structure, NOT a single log-bounce phenomenon. Does NOT solve the hierarchy, predict any mass, or remove the universal flavor puzzle (#104/#108).
open: the neutrino value (×28 overshoot, #113); the charged/quark irregular magnitudes (the flavor puzzle, #97/#107/#108)

tests.name: T8_assessment
tests.description: The logarithmic throat bounce gives a power-law mass m ∝ ε^p, which governs the chargeless neutrino sector's form and ordering (#113) but overshoots its value (×28 = 2^4.8 amplification); the charged-lepton (winding) and quark (cavity) hierarchies are different mechanisms. The flavor hierarchy is not unified by the log-bounce; the steep power explains why the neutrino values are residual (hypersensitivity).

verdict:
THE LOGARITHMIC THROAT BOUNCE GOVERNS THE NEUTRINO FLAVOR SECTOR — ITS FORM AND ORDERING, NOT ITS VALUE — AND IS NOT THE FLAVOR HIERARCHY'S UNIFYING MECHANISM. PRs #88/#132 made the bounce action logarithmic, S = c(rs/2)ln(1/ε); this probe audits whether the three-generation mass hierarchy follows from those logarithmic bounce lengths.

THE MECHANISM: LOG-BOUNCE ⟹ POWER-LAW MASS. With S = c·L*(ε) = c(rs/2)ln(1/ε), a tunnelling mass is m = m_0 e^{−S} = m_0 ε^{c rs/2} = m_0 ε^p — the logarithm turns the exponential into a PURE POWER LAW in the throat penetration depth ε (verified e^{−cL*} = ε^p). Masses are powers of ε, not exponentials of a linear quantity.

THE NEUTRINO SECTOR IS THE LOG-BOUNCE SECTOR. The neutrino is the only genuine tunnelling sector — k = 0, chargeless, the neck not EM-propped (#86/#88) — so m_ν = m_D e^{−S} ∝ ε^p with p ≈ 4.8 (#112). The generation healing lengths ε_n ∝ 1/χ_n (#79/#113) give the right ORDERING (normal), but the steep power amplifies the modest χ_n spread: a ~×2 spread in ε becomes 2^4.8 ≈ 28× in mass — the ×28 overshoot of #113. So the log-bounce governs the neutrino hierarchy's form and ordering, with the value residual.

CHARGED LEPTONS AND QUARKS ARE NOT LOG-BOUNCE. Charged leptons are Dirac (c₁ = ±1, neck EM-propped, no tunnelling, #86/#88); their masses come from the winding ladder β·k² (#71), and their ln(m) is irregular (gen-differences 5.33, 2.82 — ratio 0.53). Quarks are shell-resolving cavity overtones (#77–#80, the n_part sector); their ln(m) is irregular too (up-type 6.37, 4.91 — ratio 0.77). So the flavor hierarchy is a THREE-mechanism structure — bounce (ν), winding (charged leptons), cavity (quarks) — not a single log-bounce phenomenon.

WHY THE FLAVOR VALUES ARE RESIDUAL. The power law m ∝ ε^p has ∂ln m/∂ln ε = p, so with p a few the masses are HYPERSENSITIVE to the throat penetration depth: a ×2 ambiguity in ε becomes 2^p ≈ 28× in mass. The irreducibility of the flavor values (#108) is therefore a CONSEQUENCE of the exponential mass-action relation — the log-bounce amplification — not a separate mystery: even a fully-determined geometry would leave the masses hypersensitive to the ε residual (#112).

SCOPE. An audit/classification: it establishes the log-bounce ⟹ power-law mechanism, locates it in the neutrino sector (form & ordering), separates the charged-lepton (winding) and quark (cavity) sectors, and explains the flavor values' residual-ness as log-bounce hypersensitivity. It does NOT solve the flavor hierarchy, predict any mass value, or remove the universal flavor puzzle (#104/#108).
